mapper.select:
SELECT SUBSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS ADD_CNTRCT_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS ADD_CNTRCT_NM , CNTRCT_DOC_FLG AS ADD_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE FROM (SELECT SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM ||'|'|| PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM , CNTRCT_DOC_FLG FROM PRDCT_DOC_LIST A, PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT B WHERE A.PRDCT_ID = B.PRDCT_ID AND PUB_NTC_PRDCT_TYPE_CD = #{pubNtcPrdctTypeCd}
AND B.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_OEPN_DT <= SYSDATE AND B.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_END_DT >= SYSDATE
AND B.BULLTN_FLG = '1')

SELECT SUBSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS ADD_CNTRCT_FILE_NM --추가서류파일명 , SUBSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS ADD_CNTRCT_NM --추가서류약관명 , CNTRCT_DOC_FLG AS ADD_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE --추가서류계약서류제공코드 1:홈페이지,2:계약서류,3:홈+계약서류 FROM (SELECT SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM ||'|'|| PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM , CNTRCT_DOC_FLG FROM PRDCT_DOC_LIST A WHERE A.PRDCT_ID IN ( SELECT PRDCT_ID FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT WHERE PRDCT_ID = #{prdctId}
AND PUB_ANNUNCMNT_OEPN_DT <= SYSDATE AND PUB_ANNUNCMNT_END_DT >= SYSDATE
AND BULLTN_FLG = '1' ) ) WITH UR
